pages.raw_text:
BOISE, June 18.-Jack Frye, wit
ness for the prosecution in the
Haywood case, was badly beaten
at noon today by Bob Meldrum and
Claude Bartell, 2 gun men. the af-
fair took place in the hallway of
Hawley's office.


Frye was trying to enter the Of
flee in response to subpoena
from Hawley. Meldrum and Bar
tell stopped him and demanded
where he was going. He showed his
orders, but the guards said that
made no difference and knocked
down and kicked him into the
street.


The affair created a decided SEN
sation. Frye says, having been
beaten by state officers, he will re-
fuse to testify.


Medium and Bartells were ar
rested, charged with assault. Bar.
tells pleaded guilty and was fined
$50. Meldrum pleaded not guilty
and will be tried later.
